name: @platform/publishers
description: Publisher adapters for the Fanaa Platform (PLATFORM.md §10). Materialises a `UniversalProduct` (M5/M6 pipeline output) into a store-native shape. M7 ships the reference FanaaPublisher: file-backed materialisation to `.platform-data/products/<storeId>/<id>.json`, deterministic SKU + slug, offer-tier expansion, beauty/wellness taxonomy inference, full Zod validation. Octokit PR writer / preview / unpublish are deferred to M8/M9 — the contract leaves room.
